## ⚓ Pull Request Template

### 🛡️ Alignment with Pillars
- [ ] Does this PR prioritize **clarity over cleverness**?
- [ ] Are we maintaining **minimal dependencies**?
- [ ] Is the code **portable** across Windows, macOS, and Linux?

### 📝 Description
{Provide a clear summary of the changes and the problem they solve.}

### 🧪 Testing
- [ ] Unit tests passed
- [ ] Manual verification on {OS/Platform}
- [ ] Edge cases considered (e.g., empty dirs, missing permissions)

### 🔗 Related Issues
Fixes #{Issue Number}
